reasoning: The vfx_heal_2_v01 asset is a pixelated heart with a bright green gem center and gold/yellow border with a white pixel outline. It is immediately spottable within 0.5s against the dark dungeon floor tiles — the brightness and distinct heart silhouette make it easy to locate. The white pixel outline cleanly separates it from the dark background and there is no blending into bg tiles. Green is semantically appropriate for a heal VFX. However, it reads slightly like a pasted sprite rather than an in-world effect — no shadow/depth integration with the floor. The heart silhouette risks being read as a collectible health pickup rather than a VFX burst. The green+gold palette doesn't fully harmonize with the game's dominant teal/cyan cool tone but doesn't clash severely. Pixel art fidelity and cleanliness are consistent with the Echoes aesthetic. Dark-area visibility is strong. Overall serviceable and functional but with minor integration and legibility concerns.
